name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry is a pawn shop in Miami offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, and retail merchandise sales with flexible payment options.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates as a pawn shop located at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, Florida. The business is part of the EZPAWN family of stores and serves the local community by providing quick cash solutions through pawn transactions and precious metals buying.

The company offers a range of interconnected financial and retail services. Primary offerings include pawn loans where customers bring items in working condition to receive immediate cash, gold and diamond jewelry buying at competitive rates, and retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise (electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming equipment, handbags, sneakers) at 25-70% discounts below retail prices. They also provide layaway options with 10% down payments, third-party financing for up to 12 months, auto loans, firearms sales, and an online shopping platform. The EZ+ Rewards Program allows customers to earn points on transactions and manage pawns remotely.

Value Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through several service enhancements: an Instant Quote tool for electronics that provides same-day valuation estimates, expert precious metals testing for fair pricing, Jewelry VIP and Product Protection Plans offering guaranteed loan amounts and damage coverage, and daily inventory updates. Their extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-6pm Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday) increase accessibility for the Miami community.

The core limitation of this business model is inherent to pawn lending: customers must surrender personal property to receive funds, creating practical and emotional friction compared to unsecured lending. Pawn loan terms, fees, and interest rates vary and require in-person discussion with staff. Additionally, not all services (particularly online payments) are universally available—specifically excluded in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania. The company's reliance on retail merchandise sales means inventory quality and selection fluctuate daily.
pros: Instant Quote tool provides same-day electronic valuations online without store visit
Expert precious metals testing ensures fair and accurate gold/diamond pricing
Extended store hours (until 7pm weekdays, open Sundays) accommodate working customers
EZ+ Rewards Program tracks pawns, enables online payments, and awards points on eligible transactions
Layaway option requires only 10% down with flexible monthly payment schedules
Daily inventory updates with 25-70% discounts on brand-name electronics and merchandise
Third-party financing partnerships offer 12+ month payment plans for eligible customers
Protection Plans available for jewelry (guaranteed future loan amounts) and products (damage/malfunction coverage)
cons: Pawn transactions require surrendering personal property as collateral—higher friction than unsecured loans
Pawn loan terms, fees, and interest rates not disclosed on website; requires in-person negotiation
Online payment functionality explicitly unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania
Retail merchandise quality and availability vary daily based on incoming pawned/consigned items
All items are pre-owned; no warranty that brand-name items remain covered by original manufacturer guarantees
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who own valuable electronics, jewelry, or tools
Miami residents seeking to buy discounted pre-owned brand-name merchandise (TVs, phones, gaming)
People without credit access or unwilling to undergo credit checks for short-term loans
Customers in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania (excluded from online payment services) should verify service availability
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for Miami-area consumers with valuable personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools) who need immediate cash without credit checks or underwriting delays. The primary caveat is that pawn lending requires surrendering collateral and involves undisclosed fees/rates that must be negotiated in-person—making it suitable for short-term cash needs rather than long-term borrowing, and unsuitable for those unable to reclaim items within the loan period.
services: Pawn loans against collateral items in working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying and testing
Retail sales of pre-owned electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming equipment, and fashion
Instant Quote tool for electronic item valuation
Layaway purchases with 10% down and monthly payments
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan (guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up credit, free cleaning/repairs)
Product Protection Plans (damage/malfunction coverage for electronics and merchandise)
Online shopping platform with daily new arrivals
EZ+ Rewards Program (points tracking, online payment management, pawn extensions)
